title: bromus secalinus subsp. multiflorus
intro: Bromus secalinus subsp. multiflorus, also known as the false brome or false bromegrass, is a perennial grass species within the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of this plant are said to include the treatment of various digestive issues, such as diarrhea and indigestion, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The herbal preparations of Bromus secalinus subsp. multiflorus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
